description: County or local tax-sale record, tax deed, tax resale, or related tax-title event.
Mortgage, foreclosure, judgment, sheriff sale, or sheriff deed tied to debt.
Voluntary or alleged private deed, warranty deed, quitclaim deed, or sale after restrictions changed.
Sale or transfer involving a guardian, minor allottee, incompetency proceeding, or court approval.
Probate, heirship, partition, estate, or court division issue.
Oil and gas lease, mineral deed, assignment, royalty interest, or severed minerals.
Railroad, road, pipeline, utility, public project, or condemnation-related taking or encumbrance.
Record suggests restrictions were removed, federal approval was absent, contested, or unclear.
Record or family evidence alleges fraud, misrepresentation, predatory lending, or improper transaction.
Family found land records but the transfer/loss mechanism is not yet clear.
